monologues.starting_animation_1: Okay, okay, okay. Just a second, compiling shaders, caching data.
monologues.starting_animation_3: If you see a black screen – that's normal.
monologues.starting_animation_5: The first launch is always exciting!
monologues.its_alive_1: Ha-ha, look! It's alive! It's bouncing!
monologues.its_alive_2: Even though it's just a three-frame animation loop, at this moment
monologues.its_alive_3: a bond is born between the object and its creator.
monologues.its_alive_4: You are no longer just an observer, you are the cause.
monologues.1a_Y_wake_up: Y, wake up. We have a lot to do today. Y, wake up. We have a lot to do today. Y, wake up. We have a lot to do today.
monologues.what_if_u_died_1: Dude, what if you died? Right now you're lying with your head on the keyboard, and no one can help you?
monologues.1a_no_anim: Oh, right, you don't have animation yet. One second.
monologues.wow_you_jumped_2: Do you know what just happened?
monologues.wow_you_jumped_3: You pressed a key, or a button on the gamepad,
monologues.wow_you_jumped_4: and that command was bound to the jump function inside your character.
monologues.wow_you_jumped_5: The function checked whether you were on the ground,
monologues.wow_you_jumped_6: and if so, applied an upward impulse. Physics, Y! Not magic, physics.
monologues.are_u_testing_gravity: Ah, testing gravity? I won't distract you.
monologues.1a_see_that_camera: See that camera on the nightstand? Go to it and put it on your head.
monologues.2a_just_look_at_that: Just look at that... Your whole room is white!
monologues.2a_adult_joke: I can't imagine what you were doing yesterday that everything got covered in something white...
monologues.2a_now_we_will_meet_aspect: Now we'll get acquainted with one of the most important aspects of game development – materials!
monologues.2a_materials_expl1: Materials, along with their parent – textures, perform perhaps the most important part of a game – the visuals.
monologues.2a_materials_expl2: Textures are pictures stretched over a model, while materials are procedurally generated objects.
monologues.2a_materials_expl3: (Simply put, textures have boundaries, materials don't), but each has its pros and cons.
monologues.painting_1: And this – is the texture of that statue behind you.
monologues.painting_2: Did you think how they achieve such detail?
monologues.painting_3: Of course, by stretching a 2D image onto a 3D figure.
monologues.error_arthouse_1: Oh, and this – is my favorite arthouse material.
monologues.error_arthouse_4: Although, most likely, Roma just forgot to drag the file into the folder.
monologues.collision_expl1: Look, Y, boxes are blocking your path!
monologues.collision_expl2: Do you know why these boxes won't let you pass?
monologues.collision_expl4: It's an element in games that determines whether you can go somewhere or not.
monologues.collision_expl5: Few want to just walk through a wall and fall into an endless abyss.
monologues.collision_expl7: Well, okay, jump over the boxes.
monologues.T_corridor_we_dont_have_a_lot_of_time: No, Y, we don't have much time.
monologues.T_you_should_stop: Y, you need to stop. I have little patience.
monologues.T_last_warning: Y, I'm warning you for the last time, go left.
monologues.t_corridor_idle_1: You know, Y, level design is the art of gentle persuasion.
monologues.t_corridor_idle_2: We don't lock the door. We just put a bright lamp here, nice music...
monologues.t_corridor_idle_3: and... oh, look, a sudden cliff on the right.
monologues.t_corridor_idle_5: Go left, Y. Left – to knowledge. Right – to a bug,
monologues.t_corridor_idle_6: that will make you fall through textures into the void.
monologues.puzzle_room_intro_1: Look, Y. This is a puzzle room.
monologues.puzzle_room_intro_2: Here you need to take this cube and put it on the button to open the door.
monologues.puzzle_room_intro_3: This uses several concepts at once that I want to explain to you, but for now, get started.
monologues.button_pressed_with_player_1: Look, that's a clever idea! However, the door will close the moment you step off the button.
monologues.button_pressed_with_player_2: I think a cube would be better here.
monologues.puzzle_room_well_done_1: Great job, Y! Let me try to explain what just happened.
monologues.puzzle_room_well_done_2: When you put the cube on the button, the cube touched the button's area, the so-called Area3D.
monologues.puzzle_room_well_done_3: And the button's script detected which object was on the button and sent a signal to the door to open via the animation manager.
monologues.puzzle_room_well_done_4: Smart, right? Well, let's not waste time. On to the next room.
monologues.puzzle_room_outro_1: Well, I don't want to lie, Y. We have very little time left. We have 15 minutes total, most of which we've already spent.
monologues.puzzle_room_outro_2: Let me let you into the final room and... we part ways here?
monologues.puzzle_room_outro_3: Don't worry, I've saved something really cool for the end.
monologues.somewhat_of_a_redactor_1: Welcome to the holiest of holies – a sort of editor.
monologues.somewhat_of_a_redactor_2: Here you can try yourself in Roma's role and create something of your own.
monologues.somewhat_of_a_redactor_4: Yes, it's basic, yes, without a huge pile of features, but it's made with soul.
monologues.somewhat_of_a_redactor_5: When you're done, press the Play button, and you can test your level.
monologues.debug_room_1: Y, presenting to you. This is the testing room.
monologues.debug_room_2: This is a real tool that Roma used to create this game.
monologues.debug_room_3: Here are some cubes you can interact with,
monologues.debug_room_5: And also some triangles of different sizes.
monologues.statue: Look, what an interesting statue. I definitely didn't steal it from a 3D marketplace.
monologues.this_plant_is_so_huge: This plant has grown so much it broke through the ceiling.
monologues.try_to_kill_yourself: Oh, by the way, try falling down!
monologues.you_cant_die_in_this_game: See? You can't die in this game, so this game is rated 0+!
monologues.dont_touch_this_closet_1: I... don't know why this huge closet is here,
monologues.dont_touch_this_closet_2: but I highly recommend you ignore it. Please.
monologues.idle_1: Y, what could you theoretically stare at for 15 minutes without moving?
monologues.how_could_you_lose_a_cube: God, how could you lose a cube? Oh well, here's another one.
monologues.anyone_at_the_computer: Hey, is anyone at the computer?
monologues.u_should_explore_1: I explain everything, of course, but don't be shy about experimenting yourself.
monologues.u_should_explore_2: The most interesting thing in games is trying to do what you're not expected to.
monologues.u_should_explore_4: and sometimes it opens secret rooms.
monologues.we_should_replace_the_mic_for_real: God, when will we finally replace the microphone? My ears are bleeding.
monologues.test_no_audio: This monologue has no audio file and will only be shown as subtitles.
